rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HILDA COHN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #12, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/12/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Please file a copy of the power of attorney confirming Leo Gilbert's authority as agent for Margaret Gilbert. (2) The terms of the testamentary trust as set forth on page 6 of this petition (regarding the dispositive provisions) do not appear to be correct. Paragraph (1) does not make sense. Please provide a courtesy copy of the supplement addressing these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/29/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICTOR BUI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/4/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to attorney with the following issues: 1) No allegation has been made re: federal estate taxes. 2) Please allege whether all income taxes have been paid or provided for. 3) NOT ADDRESSED: Par 3, which discusses a revocation of waiver of account, appears to be regarding a different estate. Please clarify. As indicated in the prior Examiner's Notes (and below), reference cannot be made to these notes as they are not a part of the record and the statement being made is incomprehensible. 4) NOT ADDRESSED FULLY: Please either allege that all reasonably ascertainable creditors have been given notice or there are no reasonably ascertainable creditors. 5) NOT ADDRESSED: Proposed order has not been filed. 6) NOT ADDRESSED: Notice of Hearing has not been given.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HOWARD PARKER JOHNSTON, JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/24/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The family tree attached to the supplement e-filed on 9/10/25 is just for the maternal cousins. Who are the paternal cousins? (2) It also appears to show the purported cousins as Decedent's siblings, not the descendants of his uncles or aunts. (3) Was Janet Dolores Cypher not survived by any issue? Courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned examiner by 11/10/25 to avoid a continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL PIAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/07/2025, in light of confirmation from counsel for the special administrator that special administration previously granted need not be extended. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. In a contested matter, a copy of the proposed order must be served on each person entitled to notice. Proof of service must be filed. LRSF 14.7(A)(4). 2) No proof of publication is on file. 3) No DE-147 form is on file. 4) No DE-147S form is on file. A pleading cover sheet must be attached to this form for confidential filing. 5) No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 6) Item 2d(2) of the petition: Absent waivers of bond signed by all other beneficiaries, the bond amount must match the total value alleged at item 3d(7) rounded up to the nearest thousand dollars ($1,884,000). 7) Item 3g(2)(c) must be checked with petitioner's relationship to the decedent specified. 8) Please provide the names and dates of death of the decedent's parents. 9) If petitioner's status as the decedent's surviving spouse remains in dispute, please provide proof of petitioner's marriage to the decedent. 10) No competing petition has been filed by the objector to request appointment of another person as administrator. See Probate Code section 8004(a).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ABBOTT LIVING TRUST DATED JANUARY 23, 2015 AND ANY AMENDMENT THERETO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming That Certain Assets Are Trust Assets (Probate Code 850 And 17200)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/23/2025 per counsel's request (via e-mail on 09/16/2025). Notes were e-mailed to counsel on 09/10/2025.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE 2004 MALEK-ZADEH FAMILY TRUST DATED JANUARY 23, 2004
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Assets Of Trust Under Cal. Prob. Code 850
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/4/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to attorney with the following issues: 1) Please either file a memo of points and authorities as to how this Court can make a finding as to out of state real property (Florida condo) or withdraw the request. 2) Petitioner requests that accounts titled in SF ATM Network be confirmed as trust property. Please provide substantiation that these accounts were owned by decedent and not by a separate business entity. 3) Petitioner requests that an account that is an FBO account be confirmed as trust assets. Please discuss and provide a memo of points and authorities. 4) Petitioner requests that an account that is titled in Jacob Malezadeh OR SF ATM Network Network Operating Account. Please discuss and provide a memo of points and authorities. 5) Petitioner requests that any other assets later discovered be confirmed as trust assets. However, assets must be specifically described. The language will be removed from the order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOURDES MUNOZ AGUIRRE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/12/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Item 3 of the petition is incomplete. (2) Item 3e(3) of the petition, not 3e(2), should have been checked, as there is reportedly no will. (3) The date of death must be specified for all deceased devisees and heirs. [LRSF 14.18 C. and D.] Please provide a courtesy copy of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/29/25. (A supplement, signed and verified by the petitioner should suffice.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Lack of courtesy copies can delay review. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.])

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF VICTORIA L. BRUGNARA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Peitoitn To Invalidate The Amendments To Victoria L. Brugnara Revocable Trust Dated May 21, 1998, Removal Of Trustees And For Damages Against Krista M. Grugnara Indivdually And As Trustee, Eric J. Brugnara Individually And As Trustee And Kurt D. Huysentruyt And Does 1 Through 50
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/19/2025, pending disposition of respondents' demurrer. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. A copy of the proposed order must be served on each person entitled to notice. Proof of service must be filed. See LRSF 14.7(A)(4). 2) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 30 days before the hearing. 3) No copies of the trust instruments were attached to the petition. 4) The name and address of each person entitled to notice must be stated in the petition. See Probate Code section 17201; see also CRC 7.902.
